questions.question: Which restaurants in Houston Tx are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Restaurants in Houston Tx with weekend hours include: McDonald's (Sat: 05:00-24:00), Panera Bread (Sat: 07:00-21:00), Sonic (Sat: 08:00-24:00), Jamba (Sat: 08:00-20:00), Domino's (Sat: 10:00-01:00), Domino's (Sat: 10:00-01:00), Domino's (Sat: 10:00-01:00), MOD Pizza (Sat: 10:30-23:00) and 1133 more. 1141 total with weekend availability.
